stemHtml: An aircraft is about to taxi to reach the refueling station. The aircraft will conduct a VFR flight later that day. What are the rules it should follow while taxiing?

options.a: Local aerodrome rules, general rules of the air and Visual Flight Rules (VFR).
options.b: Local aerodrome rules and general rules of the air only.
options.d: General rules of the air and Visual Flight Rules (VFR) only.
